evidence.excerpt: T218 / 目标：生成 handoff；当前无需人类操作。 每次功能改完测试完，自动提交github。 每次改完测试完自动部署到本地openclaw，需要重启openclaw的话，那就自动重启下（可以通过openclaw gateway restart 来重启）。 不要硬编码。 有新功能后要及时更新文档，文档要简洁明了，方便后续维护和使用。 测试要覆盖到新功能，测试用例要清晰明了，方便后续维护和使用。 如果context大小超过...

candidates.rationale: Repeated corrections show that short-term fixes often violate the intended reusable project direction.
candidates.ruleText: Do not replace reusable project behavior with one-off workaround, hardcoded, prompt-only, mask-only, or short-term fallback changes unless the user explicitly accepts that tradeoff.
candidates.title: Avoid one-off workaround behavior when a reusable path is required

candidates.rationale: Repeated corrections show that host integration claims need direct transport evidence.
candidates.ruleText: When changing Codex App, VS Code, hook, wrapper, or message-ingress behavior, verify the actual host transport path with a direct smoke before claiming all messages enter the loop.
candidates.title: Prove host/message ingress behavior before assuming transport control
